headline: Northern Trust Taps ICE ETF Hub to Enter U.S. ETF Servicing Market
summary: NTRS is expanding into U.S. ETF servicing. It is partnering ICE to use its ETF Hub platform to streamline operations and tap rising institutional ETF demand.

raw.headline: Northern Trust Taps ICE ETF Hub to Enter U.S. ETF Servicing Market
raw.summary: NTRS is expanding into U.S. ETF servicing. It is partnering ICE to use its ETF Hub platform to streamline operations and tap rising institutional ETF demand.

headline: Northern Trust Enters Fast-Growing ETF Servicing Race With Intercontinental Exchange Partnership
summary: Northern Trust partners with Intercontinental Exchange to launch a U.S. ETF servicing platform.

raw.headline: Northern Trust Enters Fast-Growing ETF Servicing Race With Intercontinental Exchange Partnership
raw.summary: Northern Trust partners with Intercontinental Exchange to launch a U.S. ETF servicing platform.

headline: Does Northern Trust’s (NTRS) New CK Capital Mandate and Leadership Move Reframe Its Wealth Strategy?
summary: Northern Trust recently announced it has been appointed to provide asset servicing solutions, including fund administration, global custody, financial reporting and transfer agency, for Netherlands-based CK Capital Partners’ CK Capital Value Fund Cooperatief U.A., which launched in the fourth quarter of 2025. Alongside this mandate, Northern Trust’s move to broaden its dynamic currency hedging framework with Berenberg and appoint David Albright as Global Head of Sales for Wealth Management...
